title: OpenClaw Tutorial
transcript: Open Claw has been all over the AI world lately. People call it a digital employee. While ChatGPT can answer your questions, it's just a chatbot, Open Claw can perform tasks for you. For example, it can read email, respond to them intelligently, schedule meetings, connect to your tools, and execute tasks end-to-end. In short, instead of using AI as a chatbot, you're using AI as a digital employee here. In this beginner-friendly tutorial, I will show you how you can set up Open Claw using a very easy method, and we will build two real-world automations. The first one is automatically responding to sponsorship emails, and the second one is scheduling meetings. By the end of this video, you would have built your first digital employee. All right, let's get started. Let's set up Open Claw now. There are two ways to set it up. The first one is using local machine, second one is VPS, virtual private server. We're going to use VPS because of several benefits it offers over the local setup. If you're doing local setup, you have to get a separate Mac mini or a Windows laptop to run Open Claw. You can't run it on your regular laptop because it will be a security nightmare. So, you're buying this separate machine [music] just to run it, and that might be costly. If you're using VPS, the cost uh is much lower compared to the dedicated machine.
